programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News At Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers make a pull-apart monkey bread Signature, a fast food Technical and a tiered sweet bread Showstopper. Who'll rise to the top, and who kneads to dust themselves off?

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: It’s week 3, and we’re celebrating design icons: Diane von Furstenberg, Vivienne Westwood and Versace.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi is in the Wiltshire cathedral town of Salisbury to come to the aid of 25-year-old publican Reece.

programme.title: Rich Holiday Poor Holiday
programme.desc: Support worker Cheryl and her factory employee son Harvey trade holidays with entrepreneur friends Marco and Paul. Chery and Harvey visit Dubai while Marco and Paul go motorhoming.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: TVNZ1 Quiz
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: Riddiculous
programme.desc: Ranvir Singh hosts three teams who will go head-to-head over a series of Riddiculous riddles set by Riddlemaster Henry Lewis!

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hope of winning its £10,000 jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: With thousands in cash at stake, four strangers must go head to head with a ruthless quiz genius who’s determined to send them home with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Go Girls
programme.desc: Cody deals with sex and sex bombs, and Olivia finds her own life is a battleground.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal UK
programme.desc: Join host Stephen Mulhern for one of the most exciting and iconic gameshows of all time as one of his brave contestants takes on the infamous Banker for a life-changing cash prize.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News At Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Nestled deep in the British countryside, The Repair Shop is a place where battered, broken but beloved artefacts are brought back to life.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Terry and Ashley are desperate to complete their first guest suite. Tim and Sharon have discovered something nasty lurking in their bathroom.

programme.title: My Impossible House
programme.desc: The lure of renovating a huge former threshing barn in Herefordshire is too good of an opportunity to turn down for Anthony and Sarah as they attempt to build their perfect forever home.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: Celebrity Race Across The World
programme.desc: The teams will race from Tigre, on the banks of the Paraná River, high into the far north of Argentina and 2,500 metres above sea level, to the 10,000-year-old mountain town of Tilcara.

programme.title: 800 Words
programme.desc: Laura’s one year anniversary looms large for George and war breaks out with the in-laws over a final resting place for her ashes.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: TVNZ1 Quiz
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Anzac Day 2026 Dawn Service
programme.desc: Live service: As the sun rises over the capital, veterans, defence personnel, and members of the public gather in solemn reflection, accompanied by music, karakia, and ceremonial tributes.

programme.title: All Blacks At War
programme.desc: Travelling the Western Front, grave to grave, former All Black Andrew Mehrtens shares the story of the 13 All Blacks, killed in WW I.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: An open ocean mussel farm and processing first for Ōpōtiki; a hi-tech under-net apple orchard in Hawke’s Bay; and measuring a regenerative farming approach for sheep and beef at Atkins Ranch.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: Three brothers return home to supercharge the families’ Nelson market garden, growing & selling fresh produce for wholesalers & their own thriving food store.

programme.title: Speak No Māori
programme.desc: This documentary unpacks the history of te reo Māori in Aotearoa, from its dominance to its gradual decline and the modern day revitalisation efforts.

programme.title: Tamati’s RSA Roadie
programme.desc: Presenter Tāmati Rimene-Sproat takes a pilgrimage across Aotearoa to visit our RSAs. He meets the people keeping these places alive, and captures precious wartime kōrero before its lost forever.

programme.title: Anzac Day National Commemorative Service
programme.desc: Live service of the National Commemorative Service brings together dignitaries, international representatives, and community members for a powerful tribute to the enduring Anzac spirit.

programme.title: From Field To Front
programme.desc: Former All Blacks captain Sean Fitzpatrick honours the 1905 Originals captain and WW I casualty Dave Gallaher by way of a global soil exchange. Made in association with Auckland RSA.

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: This time on Highway Cops: A pirate runs aground on his way home, perilous parking in Nelson, and a bumper stumper with three different license plates.

programme.title: The Travelling Auctioneers
programme.sub-title: Poetic Price For A Rare Book
programme.desc: Research, restore and ready for sale! An intrepid team of antiques experts and master crafters help families turn unwanted items into winning lots.

programme.title: Rugby: The Classics v Classic Wallabies
programme.desc: Live coverage of an unforgettable afternoon of rugby as former All Blacks players don the boots for ‘The Classics’ as they come up against the Classic Wallabies from Stadium Taranaki in New Plymouth.

programme.title: Tipping Point: Best Ever Finals
programme.desc: Look back at some of the most dramatic end games in Tipping History, including agonising trades and jackpot counters teetering on the edge.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.
